results.title: India's cancer screening problem may have an unlikely solution: Dogs and AI - WION
results.description: India's cancer screening problem may have an unlikely solution: Dogs and AI WION Chatbot developed to help parents receive information on HPV vaccine Moneycontrol.com Bengaluru research uses AI to hunt cervical cancer risk years before diagnosis The Times of India Vials aren't enough: Why India’s war on cervical cancer demands smarter tech CNBC TV18 Girl Effect India launches WhatsApp chatbot to help parents navigate HPV vaccination YourStory.com

results.title: Thinking about pregnancy after 30? You should first undergo fertility evalutation
results.description: Fertility declines with age, but doctors say the right time for a fertility evaluation depends on age, health and medical history. Gynaecologist shares that early assessment can help couples understand their reproductive health and treatment options.
